title: AE2 Auto Pattern Upload
description: add an upload button to the Pattern Terminal, allowing you to send encoded patterns directly to connected pattern providers with a single click.
body:
AE2 Auto Pattern Upload is a lightweight add-on for Applied Energistics 2 that adds a small upload button to the Pattern Terminal and lets you send encoded patterns directly to connected pattern providers with a single click. It is designed to remove the most repetitive step in late‑game AE2 automation: moving encoded patterns by hand between the Pattern Terminal and your pattern storage.

Once installed, the mod integrates a new button into the existing Pattern Terminal GUI next to the encode button. After you create and encode a pattern, simply press the upload button and the mod will automatically send the pattern to suitable pattern providers or other supported pattern storage on the same AE2 network. This greatly reduces GUI juggling and shift‑clicking every time you update or expand your automation setup.

AE2 Auto Pattern Upload is intentionally lightweight and non‑intrusive. It does not change the core progression or mechanics of Applied Energistics 2; it only adds a single extra control to the familiar Pattern Terminal workflow. The goal is to make pattern management more comfortable without introducing new complexity or extra grind.

This mod is essentially a standalone extraction of the pattern auto‑upload feature from my other mod, ExtendedAE‑Plus (EAEP). If you already use ExtendedAE‑Plus and enjoy its quality‑of‑life improvements for AE2, AE2 Auto Pattern Upload provides the same pattern‑upload convenience in a smaller, focused package for setups where you only want this one feature.
